rows.label: qev012101_MSG0001
rows.name: H-e-l-l-o...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012101_MSG0002
rows.name: Over heeeere! Up heeeeere![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012101_MSG0003
rows.name: Senpaaai![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012101_MSG0004
rows.name: It's me! Your cute junior, Miia![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012101_MSG0005
rows.name:
Won't you come up too, Senpai? The view
up here is amazing! It feels so good![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012101_JNK0010
rows.name: Obey

rows.label: qev012101_SEL0011
rows.name: Climb up to meet her.

rows.label: qev012101_JNK0020
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: qev012101_SEL0021
rows.name: Politely decline and leave.

rows.label: qev012101_MSG0006
rows.name:
Be careful! I fell about three
times before making it up here![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012101_MSG0007
rows.name:
A normal girl would've cried and gone home,
but I won't cry and I won't go home![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012101_MSG0008
rows.name: So please praise meeee![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012101_MSG0009
rows.name:
Ah, hurry up and come up here!
I'm getting tired of shouting![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012101_MSG0010
rows.name: Ehhh? Why not?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012101_MSG0011
rows.name:
It's a waste to miss out
on this spectacular view![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012101_MSG0012
rows.name:
I won't lead you astray, you
should absolutely come up here![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012101_MSG0013
rows.name: Absolutely! You won't regret it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012101_MSG0014
rows.name: Come on, hurry up![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012101_MSG0015
rows.name: Good work![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012101_MSG0016
rows.name:
As expected of Senpai! You climbed
that several times faster than I did![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012101_MSG0017
rows.name: How is it? The view from up here...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012101_MSG0018
rows.name:
Coming across spectacular
views like this is the best
part of adventuring, right![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012101_MSG0019
rows.name:
Going to unknown places, breathing
air you've never breathed before,
seeing scenery you've never seen...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012101_MSG0020
rows.name:
That feeling washing over your entire body, like
being splashed by a wave, is something you can
absolutely never experience through pictures or videos.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012101_MSG0021
rows.name: I just love it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012101_MSG0022
rows.name:
I guess it's my parents'
influence, after all...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012101_MSG0023
rows.name: My parents were adventurers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012101_MSG0024
rows.name:
They were quite well-known back on
Earth, and even successfully summited
Mount Everest as a couple a few times.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012101_MSG0025
rows.name: They even had a TV station as a sponsor![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012101_MSG0026
rows.name: But when I was 15...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012101_MSG0027
rows.name:
They tackled a mountain that wasn't
even considered that difficult[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012101_MSG0028
rows.name:
The message of their successful
summit arrived just fine, but on
the way back... they went missing...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012101_MSG0029
rows.name:
A massive search was conducted, but in
the end, my parents were never found.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012101_MSG0030
rows.name: I don't think they let their guard down.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012101_MSG0031
rows.name:
They prepared meticulously as always
that day, and headed out with their
usual serious expressions...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012101_MSG0032
rows.name:
Papa and Mama taught me both the joys
and the hardships of adventure![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012101_MSG0033
rows.name: That's why I'm inheriting their will...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012101_MSG0034
rows.name:
Because Papa and Mama would have
definitely explored every inch
of this planet called Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012101_MSG0035
rows.name:
I feel like I have to
explore it all for them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012101_MSG0036
rows.name: I mean, look![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012101_MSG0038
rows.name:
There are tons of sights here you could
absolutely never see on Earth...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012101_MSG0039
rows.name:
No matter how much I look around, I
might never be able to catch up![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012101_MSG0040
rows.name:
So I have to go at full speed and adventure
enough for both Papa and Mama too![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012101_MSG0041
rows.name: ...Eh!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012101_MSG0042
rows.name: Iyaaaaah! I'm falliiiing!

rows.label: qev012101_MSG0043
rows.name: Ehhhhh!? What is thiiiis!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012101_MSG0044
rows.name: You didn't... save me... did you!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012101_MSG0045
rows.name:
No way! Am I gonna be
eaten!? Consumed!? Me!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012101_MSG0046
rows.name: Iyaaaaaah! Senpaaai, help meeeee!
